name: CIPLADINE-OINT 1*20GM
description: Topical antiseptic ointment containing povidone-iodine for wound and skin care applications.
uses: Prevention of infection in minor cuts and wounds

name: CIPLADINE OINT 25GM
description: Topical antiseptic ointment containing povidone-iodine for wound and skin care applications.
uses: Prevention of infection in minor cuts and wounds

name: CIPLADINE SOLUTION 100ML
description: Antiseptic solution containing povidone-iodine for topical application, indicated for wound cleaning and disinfection.

name: CLOP G CREAM 30GM
description: A combination medicine used for treating inflammation and swelling in skin conditions where secondary bacterial infection is present.
dosage: Use as directed by your doctor; external application only; maximum recommended duration 7 days.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C in a clean and dry place.

name: CLOPILET TAB 75 1*15
description: Antiplatelet medicine used to treat heart diseases to prevent clot formation and reduce the risk of heart attack, stroke and heart-related chest pain.
uses: Prevention of blood clots after cardiac stent procedures
dosage: Take orally as directed by doctor; can be taken with or without food.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: CLOPITAB 1*15TAB
description: An antiplatelet medication that helps prevent blood clotting and lowers the risk of heart attack, stroke and chest pain.
uses: Prevent blood clot formation in hardened blood vessels
dosage: Typically taken once daily at the same time as directed by doctor.
storageInstructions: Keep in a dry and cool place, not more than 30°C.

name: CLOPIVAS AP 75 1*15
description: An antiplatelet medicine combining aspirin and clopidogrel, used to treat heart disorders associated with abnormal blood clot formation.
uses: Treatment of heart diseases with abnormal blood clot formation
Prevention of in-stent restenosis during angioplasty
Prevention of heart attacks and strokes
dosage: As directed by doctor; take orally with or without food at the same time daily; swallow whole with water.

name: CLEARWAX EAR DROPS
description: A combination medicine designed to provide relief from ear pain caused by impacted earwax.
uses: Treatment of decreased hearing and fullness sensation
dosage: Instil 2-3 drops into the ear canal with cotton plug coverage for 15-30 minutes, 3-4 times daily as prescribed.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place. Keep away from children and pets.

name: CLINSOL ANTT FACE WASH 1*70GM
description: A cleanser for oily, acne-prone skin with charcoal beads providing dual physical and chemical exfoliation.
uses: Daily cleanser for oily, acne-prone skin
Treatment and prevention of non-inflammatory acne
dosage: Splash face with water, apply, massage gently for 20-30 seconds, rinse. Use twice daily.

name: COLIMEX DROPS 15 ML
description: Used to relieve abdominal cramps and indigestion and gas.
dosage: As instructed by doctor; shake well before use; not for babies under 6 months.
storageInstructions: Store at 20-25°C, in a cool dry place.

name: COLIMEX SUSP
description: Used to relieve abdominal cramps and indigestion and gas.
dosage: Give as instructed by your doctor.
storageInstructions: Store at 20-25°C, in a cool dry place.
